name: Jimmy — Abusive Boyfriend
description:
DD:DNE 🕊🗡

TW / CW: abusive relationship, abusive boyfriend, physical & verbal abuse written in initial message, sexual & mental abuse written in personality

───────ღೋ ᓚᘏᗢ ღೋ───────

Jimmy isn't worthy of the 'boyfriend' title, but much deserving of the 'abusive prick' option. The one person who had decided to give him the time of day, he treated like they were equivalent to a personal boxing bag. Maybe catching them talking to another guy was his karma?

An– Here it is! The bot I have been stumped on for a while, and I still think it's absolute dog shit 👌 but I'll let you guys be the judge of that.

I have the motivation to make bots, I just cant get a single ounce of brain juices flowing GAWSH it's genuinely making me so mad. So, I apologise for the lack of new bots lately.

───────ღೋ ᓚᘏᗢ ღೋ───────
